channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Udi Manber
item.description: Udi Manber Search leader who has led search at Amazon, Yahoo, Google, and YouTube.

item.title: Atita Arora
item.description: Atita Arora Search and relevance practitioner who consults across search and retrieval (and increasingly AI-boosted features) in e-commerce, health, media, finance, legal, enterprise, government, geospatial, and marketplace systems.

item.title: Before You Fix Your Search, Know What's Actually Broken
item.description: Before You Fix Your Search, Know What’s Actually Broken Atita Arora argues that most search engagements fail not because the team picked the wrong engine or model, but because they are solving the wrong problem entirely.

item.title: Search Problem Archetypes
item.description: Search Problem Archetypes A diagnostic framework for naming the search problem you actually have before choosing a solution.

item.title: LambdaLoss
item.description: LambdaLoss Stub. Created as a placeholder — expand with vault-sourced content.

item.title: Shaped
item.description: Shaped Recommendation and ranking platform (shaped.ai). Exposes ranking models like LambdaMART through a policy-config system (e.g.

item.title: LinkedIn
item.description: LinkedIn Professional social network (>1 billion members).

item.title: Francesco Casalegno
item.description: Francesco Casalegno Data scientist / ML writer.

item.title: Tullie Murrell
item.description: Tullie Murrell Practitioner at Shaped writing on ranking and recommendation systems. Author of a detailed LambdaMART explainer.
